description:
Evaluate the safety of three common malaria prophylaxis medications (Chloroquine, Mefloquine, and Doxycycline) for a patient currently taking the cancer drug Nilotinib using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Determine the interaction traffic-light color for each drug combination and identify the safest option (the one with the least severe/Green interaction). Create a report file at /sdcard/nilotinib_malaria_report.txt listing the color for each drug and recommending the safest option using the following format:

Travel Safety Report: Nilotinib
-------------------------------
Chloroquine: [COLOR]
Mefloquine: [COLOR]
Doxycycline: [COLOR]

Safest Recommendation: [Drug Name]
